mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM annual_leave_rule WHERE
min_years <= #{years} AND (max_years IS NULL OR max_years > #{years})
LIMIT 1
SELECT days FROM annual_leave_rule WHERE #{seniorityYears} >= min_years AND #{seniorityYears} < max_years

SELECT hours FROM annual_leave_rule WHERE #{seniorityYears} >= min_years AND (max_years IS NULL OR #{seniorityYears} < max_years)
LIMIT 1
